analysis_population.exclusion_rule: reuse the frozen Record160 excluded_no_successful_source rule exactly; no post-hoc exclusion is allowed

constraint_catalog.combination_rule: current_rules computes all applicable dimensions, then applies the existing fixed judgement guard sequence and highly_and_partial result policy; the audit records every failed dimension rather than only the first

datasets.activation: non-empty datasets; explicit_fields controls the additional guard penalty
datasets.missing_value: unknown when both title and abstract are empty; production match result remains auditable

domains.activation: QueryConstraint.domains is schema-visible but has no candidate-level predicate; current_rules domain scoring uses QueryAnalysis.domain instead
domains.combination: not applicable to candidate constraint decisions

exclude_terms.combination: passes only when no excluded term matches
exclude_terms.missing_value: unknown when both title and abstract are empty; production no-match result is recorded separately

methods.missing_value: unknown when both title and abstract are empty

must_include_terms.activation: non-empty must_include_terms; explicit_fields controls the all-terms guard
must_include_terms.combination: all expected terms must match for the explicit guard
must_include_terms.missing_value: unknown when both title and abstract are empty; production match result remains auditable

paper_types.combination: any configured production paper-type alias matches
paper_types.missing_value: unknown when both title and abstract are empty; production match result remains auditable

time_range.combination: year satisfies both present inclusive bounds
time_range.missing_value: unknown when year is null; production constraint result is false but the out-of-range guard is not applied

venues.combination: any normalized expected venue is a substring of the normalized paper venue
venues.missing_value: unknown when venue is null or empty; production constraint result is false

normalization.term_match: current_rules casefolded term-boundary predicate with lexical_normalization_policy=off
normalization.venue_match: current_rules casefold plus removal of spaces, underscores, and hyphens

shadow_analysis.constraint_leave_out: remove exactly one applicable QueryConstraint field for all candidates in a query, call the production current_rules judgement, reranker, and selector, and never combine removals
shadow_analysis.order_invariance: reorder each constraint value list and explicit_fields without changing values, then require production judgement/category/score, ranking, and selected identities to remain identical
shadow_analysis.warning: shadow results describe rule selectivity and interaction only; they are not deployable alternatives or quality measurements

statistical_method.estimand: equal mean over frozen query connected components after query-equal aggregation within component

validation_invariants: every budget-retained candidate has exactly one opaque decision record
decision records reconstruct production judgement categories, constraint survivors, ranking, and final selected identities exactly
all applicable constraints are emitted and all non-applicable constraints are explicit
all failed and unknown constraints are retained; first-failure-only traces are forbidden
reason codes agree with the referenced field-state and production predicate result
null, empty, and present field states are not silently conflated
field aliases are resolved only through the production Paper schema and predicate helpers
constraint value order and explicit_fields order cannot alter production outputs
snapshot tree remains unchanged and no network, LLM, evaluator, or quality path is used
warnings: This audit explains current_rules constraint selectivity and interactions only; it does not establish relevance, Precision, Recall, or an official score.
A failed or unknown constraint dimension is not by itself proof that the paper should be excluded or included.
Single-constraint leave-out is a read-only shadow analysis and must not be interpreted as a recommendation to relax production rules.
